subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of God, the King, the Most Exalted, the All-Powerful, the Almighty, the Glorious, the Best-Beloved, Who remembereth the people in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الله الملک المتعالی القادر المقتدر العزیز المحبوب و یذکر الناس فی
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
